title: asplenium perplexum
intro: Asplenium perplexum, also known as the New Zealand shield fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Aspleniaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Māori medicine, where it has been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Asplenium perplexum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
